title: StudioDash Dashboard
description: Monitor your apps, revenue, websites, integrations, and developer services from one unified StudioDash dashboard.
summary: StudioDash brings together the information developers need every day, helping you understand the health of your apps and services from a single workspace.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything at a Glance
featureShowcases.summary: Start every day with a complete overview of your apps, websites, revenue, and connected services.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash brings together the information that matters most into a single dashboard, making it easy to spot changes, monitor provider health, and identify opportunities without constantly switching between different services. From here you can quickly move into the detailed analytics pages whenever you need to investigate further.
bullets: View revenue, app status, website activity, provider health, and synchronisation status in one place.
Clearly identify providers that need attention or configuration.
Jump directly from the dashboard into detailed analytics.

image.alt: StudioDash dashboard showing revenue, app status, website activity, provider health, and synchronisation
image.caption: Everything you need to monitor your portfolio from one dashboard.

sections.heading: One Dashboard for Your Entire Portfolio
paragraphs: StudioDash is designed to replace the need to constantly switch between multiple developer dashboards. Instead of opening App Store Connect, Cloudflare, Google services, and other platforms individually, you can review everything from one central workspace.
The dashboard is designed for quick daily reviews while providing direct access to more detailed analytics whenever you need them.

sections.heading: What You'll See
paragraphs: The dashboard combines live operational information with historical trends, giving you both an overview of what's happening today and the context needed to understand longer-term performance.
bullets: App downloads, lifecycle status, ratings, and reviews where available.
Website traffic, search visibility, indexing, and validation status.
Provider health, synchronisation status, and attention alerts.
Historical trends and recent performance changes.

sections.heading: Demo & Live Data
paragraphs: StudioDash clearly distinguishes between demonstration data and live provider information. This helps you understand exactly which information comes from connected services and which features are still being explored during development.
If a provider has not yet been configured or doesn't have data available, StudioDash explains why, keeping every dashboard card visible so you always know what action to take next.
